[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PROBE ray_client_ready:probe COMMAND 1/1: kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray wait --for=condition=Ready pod/ray-client --timeout=5s (timeout=10s)
pod/ray-client condition met
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] EXIT 0
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PRECONDITION ray_client_ready: already satisfied
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PROBE ray_head_service_ready:probe COMMAND 1/1: /bin/sh -c 'set -e; kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray get service ray-head -o jsonpath='"'"'{range .spec.ports[*]}{.port}{"\n"}{end}'"'"' | grep -qx '"'"'6379'"'"'' (timeout=10s)
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] EXIT 0
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PRECONDITION ray_head_service_ready: already satisfied
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PROBE ray_head_ready:probe COMMAND 1/1: /bin/sh -c 'set -e; kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray rollout status deployment/ray-head --timeout=5s >/dev/null; ready=$(kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray get deployment ray-head -o jsonpath='"'"'{.status.readyReplicas}'"'"'); test ${ready:-0} -ge 1' (timeout=10s)
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] EXIT 0
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PRECONDITION ray_head_ready: already satisfied
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PROBE ray_worker_ready:probe COMMAND 1/1: /bin/sh -c 'set -e; kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray rollout status deployment/ray-worker --timeout=5s >/dev/null; ready=$(kubectl -n wf-2026-03-26t03-49-12z-workflow-r-23da6aa7-ray get deployment ray-worker -o jsonpath='"'"'{.status.readyReplicas}'"'"'); test ${ready:-0} -ge 2' (timeout=10s)
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] EXIT 0
[2026-03-26T03-50-24Z] PRECONDITION ray_worker_ready: already satisfied

ray reports 3 nodes
